title: Update company name, phone number, and location across the site

requirements.text: Update all instances of the company name to 'Insight Research and Communications', phone number to '+91 9353172674', and location/address to 'Bangalore, India 560001' across every page, section, component, and metadata where company information appears — including the Navigation, Footer, Hero, Contact page, and any other components that display company details.

quotes: company name is Insight research and Communications phone number india 9353172674 and location bangalore india 560001

acceptanceCriteria: The company name 'Insight Research and Communications' appears in the Navigation/header logo or brand text.
The company name 'Insight Research and Communications' appears in the Footer.
The phone number '+91 9353172674' is displayed on the Contact page and in the Footer.
The address 'Bangalore, India 560001' is displayed on the Contact page and in the Footer.
No outdated placeholder company name (e.g., 'InsightPro') remains anywhere on the site.
All other content and styling remain unchanged.

constraints: Do not change any backend logic or data schema.
Do not alter the visual theme, layout, or any content unrelated to company name, phone number, and location.
nonGoals: Changing any service, research, or methodology content.
Updating the contact form submission logic.
